rules.Daemonic Thirst: A weapon with this rule inflicts a Mortal Wound on its bearer in each of your Command Phases if you did not cause a Wound with the weapon during the last Turn. This does not trigger on Turn 1.
rules.Grinding Advance: This model counts as not moving when firing Ordnance weapons.
rules.Insanity: A model with Insanity will never Flee, Go to Ground, or perform the regular behavior for failing a Ld Test. Instead, it MUST move its full Movement towards the closest enemy model in their Movement Phase, or as close as it can. In the Shooting Phase, it must fire with its weapons at the closest enemy model unless this would prevent it from declaring a legal charge during the Assault Phase. If it is out of range of both weapons and 12" for declaring Charges, it will Advance instead towards this model. In the Assault Phase, it must declare a Charge if able against the closest enemy model. In addition, this unit suffers -1 To Hit once it has fallen to its Insanity. This lasts until the end of the game. If a High-Altitude capable model suffers from Insanity it will spend its next movement (even if it is less than legally allowed) going to the closest enemy model it can reach. It then suffers Crash and Burn as if it had been destroyed. If it cannot reach an enemy model, it performs Crash and Burn in place instead. In either case, remove all remaining Wounds from its profile and it is considered Destroyed by whatever source caused Insanity to trigger.
rules.Limited Ammo: This model may not make Overwatch attacks or Snap Shots.
rules.Marks: Marks of Chaos are optional upgrades for units. Marks perform the following enhancements to units. Stats in Bold have this baked into the profile. Psychic Mastery Level # models and units may only use the corresponding spell list with their Marks.
rules.Mark of Khorne: This model gains A+1 and Furious Charge.
rules.Mark of Nurgle: This model gains a 5+ Feel No Pain. This is an exception to the rule that prevents Vehicle's from gaining Feel No Pain.
rules.Mark of Slaanesh: This model gains I+1 and Counterattack.
rules.Mark of Tzeentch: This model gains a 5+ Invulnerability Save, or improves their Invulnerability Save by -1 (Improves by 1) to a maximum of 4+. When interacting with situational Invulnerability Saves such as Flare Launchers or Void Shields this ability only applies to the situational benefit and does not apply normally. If a model already has a 4+ Invulnerability Save, it instead may reroll 1s for Invulnerability Saves.
rules.Undivided: One unit in your army may take a Pure Blessing, even if you do not have a full army of the correct Mark.
rules.Poor Maintenance: In each of your Command Phases, roll a d6 for each unit with this rule in your army. On a 1, the unit must decide if it will Move or Shoot this turn. If elected to Move, it may Advance and Fall Back this turn but cannot Shoot or Charge. If elected to Shoot, it may Shoot in the Shooting Phase, but cannot Move, Advance, Charge, or Fall Back. High Altitude models MUST always move and can never opt to Shoot instead of Move because of Poor Maintenance.
rules.Reliable: This weapon ignores the Limited Ammo rule.
rules.Mark: Marks of Chaos are optional upgrades for units. Marks perform the following
rules.Augar Array: 6" Aura, target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking. This Aura is cast
rules.Chaff Launchers: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.
rules.Chaff Launcher: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.
rules.Corrupted Vox Caster: The unit may benefit from any friendly Aura that does not grant
rules.Dozerblade: Reroll Dangerous Terrain Tests and failed Move through Cover.
rules.Extra Armour: You may treat all Crew Stun Results as Weapon Disabled.
rules.Medicae Pack: 6" Aura, this model's unit and target unit gain a 5+ Feel No Pain.
rules.Recovery Gear: Roll d6, on 5+ repair Immobilized or Crew Stun result.
rules.Searchlight: This unit and target unit are no longer affected by Night rules.
rules.Smoke Launchers: 6" range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 to Hit and scatters to
rules.Smoke Launcher: 6" range, put 5" Smoke Cloud that causes -1 to Hit and scatters to

rules.Disciplined: All models in your army gain Ld+1.
rules.Followers of Khorne: All models in your army must have the Mark of Khorne.
rules.Renegades: all models in your army only count as half a model for Contesting
rules.Renegade: all models in your army only count as half a model for Contesting

rules.Heavily Tainted: All Infantry models from the Traitor Guard supplement in your army

rules.Calculated Defense: Models in your army cannot Claim or Contest Objectives in the
rules.Dug In: All models in your army gain Stealth and all Infantry gain Objective Secured so

Your army may Generic Company Command Squad Company Commander Disciple Heavy Weapons Team Wargear Company Commander: Autopistol Brutal Weapon Frag Grenades Refractor Field Disciple: Autogun Frag Grenades Heavy Weapon Team: Heavy Flamer Lasgun Frag Grenades
rules.Inspiring the Rabble: 6" Aura, remove one target Infantry model from target friendly unit with Insanity from the game. The unit may ignore Insanity until your next Command Phase. Disciple: Infantry Insanity Limited Ammo Heavy Weapon Team: Infantry Insanity Limited Ammo Bulky
rules.Brutal Efficiency: 6" Aura, remove one target Infantry model from the game from a target friendly unit. This unit may reroll 1s To Hit. Sv4+ Shroud M+6, T+1, W+1, gain Steed, Very Bulky
rules.Enforced Artillery Tactics: 6" Aura, target friendly Tank suffers 3 Mortal Wounds and has its M# stat changed to Mfor the remainder of the game. It no longer suffers from Insanity. Other Vehicles in the Squadron may Abandon this Vehicle as normal and split off a new unit.
rules.Enforced Artillery Tactic: 6" Aura, target friendly Tank suffers 3 Mortal Wounds and has its M# stat changed to Mfor the remainder of the game. It no longer suffers from Insanity. Other Vehicles in the Squadron may Abandon this Vehicle as normal and split off a new unit.
rules.Forward You Dogs!: During Deployment, remove one Infantry model from a friendly unit from the game when this model is placed on the field. That target unit gains Scout.
rules.Paranoid: Each time this model or its unit fails a Ld test, remove one friendly model in this model's unit from the game. If a series of tests are taken and only one is required to fail you must still complete each test to determine friendly models slain by Paranoid.
rules.Into the Fray!: 6" Aura, remove target Infantry model from a friendly unit from the game. That unit may reroll failed Charge rolls. M+6, T+1, W+1, gain Steed, Very Bulky
rules.Protesting Machine Spirit: 6" Aura, target friendly Vehicle suffers 1 Mortal Wound but ignores one Weapon Disabled, Crew Stun, Immobilize, or Weapon Destroyed result. Servitor: Infantry Insanity Limited Ammo Steady Feel No Pain 5+
rules.Limited Ordnance: 6" Aura, this model and target unit may reroll scatter dice for Ranged weapons. For each Template that fails to hit any enemy models, that unit suffers 1 Mortal Wound.
rules.Grunt Herder: 6" Aura, remove one Infantry model from the game from a target
rules.Shoot Sharp and Scarper: this unit may move d6" after Shooting
rules.Enlarged Fuel Tanks: Reroll 1's to Wound with Flame Weapons. The Model explodes on a 4+ instead of 6+.
rules.Enlarged Fuel Tank: Reroll 1's to Wound with Flame Weapons. The Model explodes on a 4+ instead of 6+.
rules.Auspex Array: 6" Aura, this model and target unit inflict a -1 to Cover Saves taken from their Shooting.
rules.Trench Crossers: This model does not take Immobilize Tests for moving through Terrain
rules.Trench Crosser: This model does not take Immobilize Tests for moving through Terrain
rules.The Hour is Nigh: When the weapon is fired, place a marker on field at a valid target. In your next Command Phase, the missile strikes! Scatter like normal, following the 15" Blast radius rules.
rules.T Minus 5: The weapon may not be fired Turn 1. The weapon cannot be destroyed or Disabled. If the weapon is marked on the field and the carrier is destroyed, the Deathstrike Missile still hits in your Command Phase.
rules.Behemoth Shells: When the Heavy Colossus Siege Mortar fires, it must forgo Shooting in its next Shooting Phase. The Heavy Colossus Siege Mortar may not fire on Turn 1. It may fire its other weapons normally on each Turn. This model suffers M-8.
rules.Behemoth Shell: When the Heavy Colossus Siege Mortar fires, it must forgo Shooting in its next Shooting Phase. The Heavy Colossus Siege Mortar may not fire on Turn 1. It may fire its other weapons normally on each Turn. This model suffers M-8.
rules.Stable Platform: This model may reroll the Scatter Dice.
rules.Immobile Platform: This model cannot move or be moved by any means except to pivot. The last direction the Earthshaker Cannon fired counts as the Front. Shroud
rules.Mobile Artillery: This model may only be moved by a friendly model with the Tow ability. A unit being Towed uses all available Transport Capacity regardless of its actual number
rules.Remote Control: Allows Cyclops to be Detonated on command or to be moved. If no Remote Controls remain on the field, all Cyclops may not move or Detonate unless it is the 4+ to explode. Cyclops models are allowed to be targeted by Friendly Fire.
rules.Deadly Payload: This model explodes if it ever comes into base contact with an enemy model or if the owner wishes it to explode so long as at least one Guardsman has a Remote Control. If the model is destroyed, on a 4+ the Cyclops Demolition Charge goes off. In any case the weapon is used, center the template over the model and do not scatter it. The Cyclops is removed afterwards.
rules.Suicide Mission: Each Cyclops is treated as an individual unit, but is deployed with the Guardsman as if they were one.
rules.Command Ship: Auras may be issued from Embarked units on this model with +12" Radius.
rules.Transport 6: Access Rear. 2 Fire Ports Side and Rear, 1 Fire Port Front.
rules.Tow: This model may move Mobile Artillery. The unit takes the full transport capacity when being Towed.
rules.Subterranean Assault: You may place up to 10 Infantry models in Reserve with this unit during Deployment. Once this model Deepstrikes successfully, the unit may Deepstrike within 6" without scattering.
rules.Ammunition Cache: 6" Aura, this model and target unit replenishes all One Use Only Wargear. Deathstrike Missiles cannot be replenished by this ability.
rules.Escort: This model may join units like an Independent Character M-2, FA+1, SA+1
rules.Corpse Loot Cart: 6" Aura, target unit may reroll 1s To Hit and Wound
rules.All Terrain: This model may reroll Dangerous Terrain Tests
rules.Transport 25: Access Sides and Rear. 5 Fire Points on Front, Sides, and Rear.
rules.Earthshock: Any unit Hit by this Template only Moves, Advances, Charges, and Falls Back at Half Speed until your next Command Phase.
rules.Shadowsword Sensors: This model may Reroll all To Hit and Scatter dice when targeting Titanic units.
rules.Shadowsword Sensor: This model may Reroll all To Hit and Scatter dice when targeting Titanic units.
rules.Transport 50: Access Front and Rear. Assault Ramps.
rules.Fortification: This model may never be moved once placed on the Table, except when it is destroyed. Gate Tower: Building Titanic Limited Ammo
rules.Heavy Gate: In your Command Phase you may declare if the Gate is Open or Closed. Models may not move through the Gate when it is Closed. The Gate cannot be Closed if models are Obstructing the Gate.
rules.Gun Emplacement: This an existing piece of Terrain in your Deployment Zone like normal, it is placed with the Terrain instead.
rules.Shield Generator: 6" Aura, this model (and any models on top of this Terrain Feature) and target unit gain 5+ Invulnerability Save.

wargear.Augar Array: 6" Aura, target unit does not scatter when Deepstriking. This Aura is cast when the first model is placed prior to scattering.
wargear.Chaff Launchers: This model has a 5+ Invulnerability Save against Ranged Attacks.
wargear.Corrupted Vox Caster: The unit may benefit from any friendly Aura that does not grant Feel No Pain even if it is not within range.
wargear.Dozerblade: Reroll Dangerous Terrain Tests and failed Move through Cover.
wargear.Extra Armour: You may treat all Crew Stun Results as Weapon Disabled.
